Pepper__bell___Bacterial_spot: Remove infected leaves and apply copper-based fungicide.
Pepper__bell___healthy: No disease detected. Maintain proper watering and sunlight.
Potato__Late_blight: Use fungicide and remove infected plants immediately.
Potato___Early_blight: Apply fungicide and avoid overhead watering.
Potato___healthy: Plant is healthy. Maintain good soil and watering.
Tomato_Bacterial_spot: Remove infected leaves and use copper sprays.
Tomato_Early_blight: Use fungicides and rotate crops yearly.
Tomato_Late_blight: Destroy infected plants and avoid wet leaves.
Tomato_Leaf_Mold: Improve air circulation and apply fungicide.
Tomato_Septoria_leaf_spot: Remove affected leaves and use fungicide.
Tomato__Target_spot: Apply fungicide and remove infected leaves.
Tomato__Tomato_mosaic_virus: Remove infected plants and disinfect tools.
Tomato__Tomato_YellowLeaf__Curl_Virus: Control whiteflies and remove infected plants.
